Rotation interval drops from 180 to 90 days. Reach out to the helpdesk if you hit issues at next login.

Hey, the 502 you're seeing is tied to request_id=7f3a9c2e-4b1d-49aa-bc88-1e0f5a6d2c11 — I traced it through the gateway and it died at the auth middleware. Correlation ID a0b3f1e8d2c47659 shows the same upstream timeout. Going to bounce the pod and re-run.

No reuse of your last 10 passwords, and rotation is now every 180 days instead of 90. SSO accounts are exempt from rotation but still subject to the complexity rules. Heads up team — updated password requirements going into effect Nov 1: minimum 14 characters, must include at least one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit, and one symbol. No reuse of the last 10 passwords, and rotation every 180 days. SSO accounts are exempt from rotation but still subject to the length and complexity rules. Reach out to IT if your service account needs an exception.

Quick reminder from IT: legitimate helpdesk staff will never ask you for your password, MFA push code, or the contents of an SMS verification text. When in doubt, hang up and call us back at the extension on the intranet directory rather than any number provided in the suspicious message.

content: Hey, the EventKit sync is choking on a recurring meeting again. When I dump the store I see the offending identifier is 4EF9A6A3-64CC-46BF-A5AD-8ACF8FDE00EC:036F68C5-0D87-47FC-B7C2-9E123414DBDB — that's the master event UID concatenated with the occurrence UID. Can you add a guard so the agent skips orphaned occurrences instead of throwing? Repro steps are in the Linear ticket.
FYI the staging DB password was rotated last night — new value is [REDACTED]. Grab it from 1Password vault 'Infra/Staging' if you need it.
Hey — pushing our 1:1 to 3:30. Same Zoom link as before, but I had to rotate the passcode after IT flagged the old one. New passcode: 7Gx!92mq. See you then.

Heads up — I had to wipe my phone last night and used one of the backup codes to get back into the shared Notion workspace. The one I used was H7K2-9XQM-44PB-LZ8N. Can you regenerate the set when you get a chance so we don't run out before the offsite?

Hey, when the agent calls calendar.update, make sure it's passing the full composite identifier — something like 4EF9A6A3-64CC-46BF-A5AD-8ACF8FDE00EC:036F68C5-0D87-47FC-B7C2-9E123414DBDB.
